Slot: WAIST
AC: 4
Haste: +16%
WT: 1.0 Size: SMALL
Class: WAR PAL RNG SHD MNK BRD ROG BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Slot: WAIST
AC: 4
Haste: +16%
WT: 1.0 Size: SMALL

the price is silly.
QuoteReply
# Apr 09 2002 at 6:04 PM Rating: Default
Tethax
102 posts
Flowing Black Silk Sash is 21% as per www.magelo.com - item number 1365 if you want to check.

The fbss you are talking about at 17% haste - where does it drop, and how much does it cost? 5k? hehe

The only reason I could see paying this much for this belt, is because of where it loots. Other than that - it's newb twink gear.

*Welcome to EQ-Monty Hall*
▲ Page top
Haste
QuoteReply
# Mar 15 2002 at 7:17 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1595780128791
84 posts
This belt is 16% haste, fbss 21% and dragonborn sash 24%. FRSS was dropped off teen lvl mob for a very few days and is only 6% haste. It is not worth more then 800pp. EVERYONE knows CoF is 36% haste, just ask any zone and half a dozen people will tell you 36% not 40. People like ShadesongLeaderfife and ChitosKitfo are the ones that get everyone confused posting false information. They not only post incorrect info, but blame people who post the real information of being wrong. The 5% haste difference between this and a FBSS is very hard to notice as is between a Dragonborn sash and FBSS. This thing is more rare then FBSS becuase it is camped so little. I don't see many being sold, and not many people wanting to buy them either. I did see one for sale a few days ago for 3k. Basically comes down to if you want 4ac or 5% haste. Here is a link with almost all haste items which match up with the amount of haste i posted.
http://pub38.ezboard.com/fmonklybusiness43508frm3.showMessage?topicID=5085.topic

Edited, Sat Apr 27 05:28:31 2002
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Mar 26 2002 at 6:48 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I read the first few lines of your message and stopped, knowing why your obviously confused. Swirlspine belt is 16% haste. FBSS is 18% and Dragonborn is 24% people aren't full of BS, but you need to get your facts in order. Flowing RED silk sash is rumored to be 21% but it's not certain yet.
#REDACTED, Posted: Apr 11 2002 at 8:25 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) ok, the first guy with this post is BS, but yer BS is more, FRSS 16%, SS belt 16-18% FBSS 21%, SC handwraps 22%, DB sash 26% haste, SBoC 30% haste, sib zerker cloak 35% haste, CoCW 37% hatse, CoF 40% haste, and so on and so forth..this is what i get for staying in the market line of xegony for 2 months
RE: Haste

81 posts
SBoC is 24-26% haste, its pewpy :)

This will give you all the info you need for haste items. Unfortunately your listings are somewhat off. And to be honest I thought the issue of FBSS haste was cleared up long ago but just to make sure you got it... FBSS IS 21% HASTE...21%.

▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jan 27 2002 at 5:55 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) ok fbss has 21% haste thats it period. fbss goes for 3k on sol ro. SOL RO OWNZ ALL j00Z SERVERS!
#REDACTED, Posted: Feb 01 2002 at 7:11 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Har Har that right..FBSS is 17% thats it period!
#REDACTED, Posted: Apr 28 2002 at 9:57 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Garudin with 161 posts that means you have spent a decent amount of time on alla's. Just to clear this up FBSS 21 21 21 21 21 21 21 21 21 21 21 21 21 21 21 21 21. Getting the picture???? I realize you may not be able to count to 21 because of the amount of toes and fingers you have. Well then again maybe all the inbreeding has granted you an extra one, who knows. But in any case if your smart enough to post theres a slight chance you have the intell to run a parser. SIGH. If you dont know what your talking about please do not post meaningless dribble. Check out Monkly-business.com for any info needed on haste.
RE: wtf
QuoteReply
# May 17 2002 at 12:34 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592245587956
92 posts
Hey , I am able to count to 21( ok, so I got arrested doing that but WTH ) my pally has this and I am very happy with it , I like the extra ac as a tank , My monk has an fbss and I have tried both , its very difficult to tell much of a difference over a long period of time , I'm just happy I when I don't die.

#REDACTED, Posted: Nov 03 2001 at 3:18 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Fbss = 17% 7k

haste %
QuoteReply
# Nov 02 2001 at 12:53 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I had the pleasure of winning one of these babies in our group lotto the other night, or so I thought. Everyone had told me that the haste was equivalent to FBSS with a bonus 4 ac, well they could not have been more wrong. It does have the 4 ac but it is noticably slower. I wield an Oggok Cleaver (44 damage and 60 delay) so I can easily count the ticks between swings, as you can imagine. The FBSS is noticably faster so you can imagine my disapointment but o'well I'll just sell it or twink it to my monk and you can bet I won't mention the fact that the haste percentage is consderably slower unless I am asked 8)
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jan 17 2002 at 9:07 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Lol dude you couldnt be more wrong! everybody wants FBSS because...its the CHEAPST!
?

This is Better than a FBSS
QuoteReply
# Sep 04 2001 at 5:31 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591767107925
3 posts
I'd take this over a FBSS any day. I've tested both the FBSS and Swirlspine they are the same. You can't tell the difference. This Belt goes for at least the same amount as a FBSS. Anything more than 8k is too much though. I don't know why people give this belt such a bad name, its decent.

Haste is the same as fbss.

i dont know if this has always been the case. but as of now it is by no means noticable difference, if there is one, it is only one or 2 percent.

this owns fbss. having no ac in belt slot is painful. so instead of saying some haste is better then no haste, you should be saying some ac is better then no ac!

Swirlspine Haste Percentage versus FBSS!
QuoteReply
# May 16 2001 at 7:14 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Hello All,

I have personally tested this item 3 times versus the FBSS, It has beaten or tied the fbss is speed all of the times within the last few months. I personally don't know if they changed the item, because I never had it before the supposed patch, but if you are on Bertox right now and have a FBSS I will let you test it versus this item! If you haven't used it recently, you would probably not know that it is just as fast as the FBSS, as for the sash of the dragonborn I have that as well, and it is MUCH faster then both the FBSS and the Swirlspine Belt. I am on bertoxullous and my Characters names are Ahman, and Shartin if you are interested in seeing either of these in action! THanks

Shartin Elessedil
